purpose: Controls which V3 factory runs are shown in the public Recipe Review app.

hidden_reason_by_run_slug.gochujang-noodles-v1: early technical sample, not a Luke-requested V3 recipe
hidden_reason_by_run_slug.gochujang-sticky-beef-noodles-v1: technical structure sample, not source-authorised or requested for review
hidden_reason_by_run_slug.sticky-soy-ginger-chicken-rice-v1: old V2 scaffold/debug proof, not a requested V3 recipe

rules: Only Luke-requested, deliberately exposed recipe runs may appear in the public Recipe Review app.
Factory samples, blocked scaffolds, and old V2 debug runs stay on disk for developer evidence but do not count as current recipes.
Adding a recipe to this public list is not recipe approval and does not create planner readiness.
A deliberately exposed recipe may appear as blocked when the current factory gate routes it back for repair.
current_public_recipe_note: The current public V3 recipe shelf is Eggs on Toast / Poached Eggs On Sourdough Toast only. It may show as blocked while the current V3 repair gate is active.
